Description: Audit Logs Report generates successfully with filters
Preconditions: Jasper session active, MMP logged in as AdminMaker
Test Data: Start Date: June 1 2026, End Date: June 10 2026, Status: Success, Username: AdminMaker, Action Type: ALL
Validation Reason: Verify audit logs report displays correctly with all filters applied
Test Steps:
1. Login to MMP Portal as AdminMaker
2. Navigate to Reports section
3. Click on 'Audit Logs' button
4. Fill in Report Parameters:
   - Start Date: June 1, 2026
   - End Date: June 10, 2026
   - Status: Success
   - Username: AdminMaker
   - Action Type: ALL
5. Click Submit button
6. Verify Results section appears
7. Assert 'Showing 1-20 of 297 records' text visible
8. Assert 'Date Time' column header visible
9. Assert 'Jun 2026, 15:00' timestamp visible
10. Assert 'Username' column header visible
11. Assert 'AdminMaker' username in first cell
12. Click XLSX export button
Expected Result: Report loads with correct filters. Results section displays with records. Date Time column shows timestamps. Username column shows AdminMaker entries. XLSX export button works.

Description: Pending Payments Report generates and can toggle between Pending and Rejected status
Preconditions: Jasper session active, Pending/Rejected merchants exist
Test Data: From Date: May 31 2026, To Date: June 11 2026, Status: Pending then Rejected
Validation Reason: Verify pending/rejected merchant report can filter by different statuses
Test Steps:
1. Login to MMP Portal as AdminMaker
2. Navigate to Reports section
3. Click 'Merchant Pending/Rejected' button
4. Fill Report Parameters:
   - From Date: May 31, 2026
   - To Date: June 11, 2026
   - Status: All then select Pending
5. Click Submit button
6. Assert 'Showing 1-7 of 7 records' text visible
7. Assert Results section displays pending merchants
8. Change Status filter to 'Rejected'
9. Click Submit button again
10. Assert Results section displays rejected merchants
11. Assert status column shows 'Rejected'
12. Click XLSX export button
Expected Result: Report loads for Pending status. Record count visible (1-7 of 7). Status filter toggles correctly. Rejected status displays rejected merchants. XLSX export works.

Description: Merchant Status Analysis Report generates and can toggle between Pending and Success statuses
Preconditions: Jasper session active, Merchant 'Touseefullah' with different statuses exists

Validation Reason: Verify merchant status analysis report with multiple status filters and merchant filters
Test Steps:

2. Navigate to Reports section
3. Click 'Merchant Status Analysis' button
4. Assert 'Report Parameters' heading visible
5. Fill Report Parameters:
   - Status: Pending
   - From Date: June 1, 2026
   - To Date: June 11, 2026
   - Merchant Name: Touseefullah
   - Aggregator: All
   - Entity MSISDN: 25500000087
6. Click Submit button
7. Assert Results section displays
8. Click XLSX export button
9. Change Status to 'Success'
10. Click Submit button again
11. Assert Results refresh with Success status
12. Assert status column shows 'Success'
Expected Result: Report generates with Pending status. Merchant filter works. Results display correctly. XLSX export works. Status toggles to Success. Results refresh properly.

Description: Audit Logs Report fails without mandatory date fields
Validation Reason: Verify mandatory field validation for date fields

2. Navigate to Reports section
3. Click 'Audit Logs' button
4. Leave Start Date empty
5. Leave End Date empty
6. Click Submit button without filling dates
7. Assert error message 'Please fill mandatory fields' or similar appears
8. Assert report does not generate
9. Assert Results section does not appear
Expected Result: Validation error displayed. Report does not generate. Mandatory field error shown for date fields.

4. Set From Date: June 11, 2026 (later date)
5. Set To Date: June 1, 2026 (earlier date)
6. Fill other fields with valid data
7. Click Submit button
